message:
test: add methodology validation test suite for §0 framework pillars (bd-1e2if.7)

35 tests validating all four methodology pillars:
- Baseline infrastructure: schema validity, operation coverage, value sanity
- Golden checksum framework: schema, subsystem coverage, determinism
- Evidence ledger integration: collector sink, scheduler/cancel/budget entries,
  multi-subsystem accumulation, Cx propagation
- Decision contract: loss matrix invariants, posterior normalization, argmin
  correctness, fallback policy, snapshot likelihoods, audit entry validity

Plus cross-pillar consistency checks and 3 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
